programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys mark the milestone of 100 rescues with a look back at their most unforgettable homesteads. From wild transformations to fan-favorite families, they revisit it all, even answering viewers' most-asked social media questions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Colorado family's dream of self-sufficiency is crumbling under the destructiveness of their bison herd; to supply the ranch with food and water, the Raneys must first tame the chaos and build a path to true self-sustainability.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground; Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse; Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: The Raneys mark the milestone of 100 rescues with a look back at their most unforgettable homesteads. From wild transformations to fan-favorite families, they revisit it all, even answering viewers' most-asked social media questions.

programme.title: Truck Dynasty
programme.sub-title: It's a Boat. It's a Truck. It's BoatTruck
programme.desc: Due to a windfall from a custom project, Joe plans to create the Boat Truck, an amphibious Jeep; with a buyer for the Defender falling through, Pop, Jerry Jr. and Frank are tasked with finding buyers for both the Defender and the Boat Truck.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: With just a month left of the season, both crews are closing in on gold; a life-threatening accident at Dustin's site forces his crew out of the water.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: A failed assassination unleashes claims of a mind-controlled gunman; Andrew investigates the CIA's legacy of MK-Ultra, and stages a shocking experiment with mentalist Max Major to test whether a person really can be hypnotized into becoming an assassin.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew investigates what really happened to Jeffrey Epstein; by reconstructing the crime scene using insider insights, expert analysis and a full replica of his jail cell, he tests whether the evidence points to suicide, murder or something darker.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Did MKUltra's mind-control experiments spiral beyond the agency's grasp? Was Cleopatra's death truly by her own hand or a political assassination disguised as legend? Where did a painting worth $160 million disappear to without a trace?

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates several mysterious tragedies and downfalls; an expedition crew goes insane, turning cannibalistic; an explorer searches for a lost city in the Brazilian rainforest; an aspiring young actress falls victim to a deranged killer.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates conspiracy theories, including new discoveries suggesting the Titanic was sunk by more than just an iceberg, the true story behind the death of Harry Houdini and lost Civil War gold that spawned a lawsuit against the FBI.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: A body is found on a beach with only a cryptic note; the Trojan War and the Trojan Horse were once thought to be pure myth, but the discovery of ruins reveals they were all too real; new evidence may prove Shakespeare didn't write his own works.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Was witchcraft at work during the Salem witch trials, or an undiagnosed psychological illness?; did Britain's famous UFO sighting by officials have a more earthly explanation?; who's really responsible for the murder of the Mad Monk of Russia?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Diving into Lake Superior, Josh has brand-new intel that may finally solve a 100-year-old mystery: the resting place of two WW1 minesweepers; on their way to combat German mines in the Atlantic, the warships sank and took the lives of 79 sailors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Tracking America's most infamous couple, Josh teams up with a former FBI agent to scour a legendary Bonnie and Clyde hideout; then Josh hits the road on a 700-mile trip through the heartland to the site of the outlaw duo's most notorious shootout.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Tackling the most famous prison break of all time, Josh retraces the 1962 Alcatraz escape; new leads take Josh from San Francisco to the jungles of Brazil, where he finds witnesses and evidence that rewrite the FBI's version of the story.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh braves Nicaragua's croc-infested waters and snake-filled jungle to find the wreckage of the Orus; chasing Gold Rush-era fortune, Vanderbilt's ship crashed in rapids on its maiden attempt to create a new route between the Atlantic and Pacific.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: Searching for World War II's Lost Hero
programme.desc: Armed with a new eyewitness account and cutting-edge tech, Josh travels to Micronesia and dives the Pacific to find a lost P-47 Thunderbolt; piloted by an American hero, the plane took part in a daring raid during the final days of World War II.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh dives the frigid waters of the Baltic Sea in search of a revolutionary Nazi submarine, the V-80; Hitler orders it scuttled to prevent the Allies from learning its secrets; Josh risks it all to bring the prototype to the surface.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates Dracula, Cold War psychic spying, and Spartacus. From Vlad the Impaler's infamous reign of terror, to secret U.S. mind-control tests and a gladiator who defied Rome, he seeks the truth behind history's legends that refuse to die.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew tests a disturbing theory: is a secret, directed-energy weapon used in Venezuela the smoking gun behind unexplained attacks on U.S. government officials overseas? These invisible attacks led to the horrifying symptoms now known as Havana Syndrome.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh dives the frigid waters of the Baltic Sea in search of a revolutionary Nazi submarine, the V-80; Hitler orders it scuttled to prevent the Allies from learning its secrets; Josh risks it all to bring the prototype to the surface.

programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates Dracula, Cold War psychic spying, and Spartacus. From Vlad the Impaler's infamous reign of terror, to secret U.S. mind-control tests and a gladiator who defied Rome, he seeks the truth behind history's legends that refuse to die.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew tests a disturbing theory: is a secret, directed-energy weapon used in Venezuela the smoking gun behind unexplained attacks on U.S. government officials overseas? These invisible attacks led to the horrifying symptoms now known as Havana Syndrome.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Hustlers Gamblers Crooks
programme.desc: A crafty card counter robs casinos using a pair of computerized shoes; a veteran card cheat must out-cheat another cheater; a brazen bookie attempts to outrun the law.

programme.desc: Repo men chase luxury planes for big dollars across America by relying upon their wits and skill for a high reward.

programme.desc: The men face menacing mechanics, dangerous swamps and armed police officers in their attempts to repossess airplanes.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: During Christmas in 2023, severe storms unleashed an unseasonal tornado outbreak across Tennessee; as dozens of eyewitnesses capture the unbelievable, destructive power of nature, a twister strikes an electrical substation, triggering an explosion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Cameras capture the unfolding disaster as a powerful EF-4 tornado devastates Mayfield, leveling the courthouse, police headquarters and jail where officers race to rescue trapped inmates while preventing escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In 2024, as a monster storm system unleashes a record-breaking derecho across Texas, eyewitnesses capture multiple destructive tornadoes on camera; when one twister targets a remote farmhouse, a weather spotter must race to save a young family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In 2024, hundreds of cameras capture hurricanes slamming Florida's Gulf Coast; as category four Hurricane Helene brings record flooding, residents have no chance to recover before category three Hurricane Milton unleashes over 40 tornadoes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north into Appalachia, dumping 30 inches of rain; as hundreds of cameras capture flooding and mudslides, one woman gets swept away by the deluge, until a man attending a wedding rehearsal jumps into the water to save her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: After hitting Category five, Hurricane Ian slams Florida's Gulf Coast with 150 mph winds and a storm surge that sweeps away homes.
